session_summary.key_finding: EITT — Entropy-Invariant Time Transformer. Shannon entropy is empirically near-invariant under geometric-mean temporal decimation. 0.18% variation on original proof. 1.02% mean on independent confirmation. Systematic residual identified as second-order Jensen correction (Hessian footprint).
